executives.name: Andrew Liveris
executives.background: Mr. Liveris has served as Chairman of our Board since 2021. He is the former Chairman and CEO of The Dow Chemical Company and former Executive Chairman of DowDuPont. He serves on the boards of Saudi Aramco, IBM, and Worley.

executives.name: Neal Sheorey
executives.background: Mr. Sheorey has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since November 2023. Prior to joining Albemarle, he served as Vice President, Finance for Dow Inc.'s Coatings & Performance Monomers and Plastic Additives businesses.

tenure_dates.title: Various leadership roles, including Vice President of Investor Relations, Senior Director of Corporate Development, and Global Finance Director for the Chemicals business group.

executives.name: Wesley Bush
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Northrop Grumman Corporation.
